unresolved_questions: Column `browser` appears in 1 of 1 known queries against this dataset but has no description. What does it represent, and who should own documenting it?
assumptions_made: Detected usage of `browser` via a word-boundary text match against raw SQL statement text, not a parsed AST — aliased references or SELECT * usage may be undercounted, and unrelated substring matches may be overcounted.
note: Captured from a real run against a live, self-hosted DataHub quickstart instance on 2026-07-14 (python -m cairn.cli --dataset-urn ...), not a fabricated example. Sentinel found this finding independently via _find_query_drift; it was not seeded or hand-constructed. session_ts is reconstructed from the MCP server's request log timestamp, since the capsule's own timestamp isn't printed to stdout during a normal run.
